cd /workspace/YatCC && python3 -c "
[?2004l[?2004h# Quick check: does the json2asg step crash or the emitir step?
[?2004l[?2004h# Let's test with a minimal JSON
[?2004l[?2004himport json
[?2004l[?2004hj = {
[?2004l[?2004h    'kind': 'TranslationUnitDecl',
[?2004l[?2004h    'inner': [{
[?2004l[?2004h        'kind': 'FunctionDecl',
[?2004l[?2004h        'name': 'main',
[?2004l[?2004h        'type': {'qualType': 'int ()'},
[?2004l[?2004h        'inner': [{
[?2004l[?2004h            'kind': 'CompoundStmt',
[?2004l[?2004h            'inner': [{
[?2004l[?2004h                'kind': 'ReturnStmt',
[?2004l[?2004h                'inner': [{
[?2004l[?2004h                    'kind': 'IntegerLiteral',
[?2004l[?2004h                    'type': {'qualType': 'int'},
[?2004l[?2004h                    'value': '42',
[?2004l[?2004h                    'valueCategory': 'prvalue'
[?2004l[?2004h                }]
[?2004l[?2004h            }]
[?2004l[?2004h        }]
[?2004l[?2004h    }]
[?2004l[?2004h}
[?2004l[?2004hwith open('/tmp/test_minimal.json', 'w') as f:
[?2004l[?2004h    json.dump(j, f)
[?2004l[?2004h" && /workspace/YatCC/build/task/3/task3 /tmp/test_minimal.json /tmp/test_minimal.ll 2>&1; echo "EXIT: $?"; cat /tmp/test_minimal.ll
[?2004lasserted at /workspace/YatCC/task/3/Json2Asg.cpp:32
Aborted (core dumped)
EXIT: 134
[?2004h
